body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6153/51dbcc2a/1a1ece6a/3a7419b/2815037119/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") I'm going to vote against Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation to the Supreme Court, when it comes to the Senate floor. Here's why:

President Trump outsourced one of his most solemn responsibilities as president -- giving a lifetime appointment to the highest court in our nation -- to unelected, far-right, corporate special interests. This is a decision that will affect generations of Americans, and because the process was corrupt from the beginning, I won't endorse any part of it.

I know there will be costs to that decision. The Koch brothers are getting ready to attack me here in Pennsylvania, and other special interests won't be far behind. **_[I'm ready to fight back, but I need a team of grassroots donors to help match what the Koch brothers will spend -- can you chip in $5 today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180711_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

The special interest groups that picked Judge Kavanaugh champion policies that hurt working families. They want to destroy labor unions, decimate Medicaid and undo the Affordable Care Act's protections for people with pre-existing conditions. If they get their way, corporations will benefit at the expense of the middle class. That's not an option, and I'm going to fight it with both fists up.

Americans deserve better than Judge Kavanaugh and the corrupt process that nominated him. That's why I'm asking for your financial support today -- **_[small-dollar donations will give this campaign the resources we need to fight back against the Koch brothers' attacks.](https://secure.bobcasey. Bob

Monday night President Trump selected Judge Brett Kavanaugh to replace Anthony Kennedy on the U.S. Supreme Court. I think this was an excellent pick. And it brings up the discussion, is there a potential for Roe to be overturned? I'm talking about it in this week's blog. Click below to read more.

There were two things which happened last week - one of them was a pretty big deal, and the other was a really big deal. Click below to read more.

On a separate note, I hope you and your family have a wonderful Independence Day. God Bless America! [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjxtdud-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjxtdud-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Unhinged](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjxtdud-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Left seems to be coming unhinged. So many have apparently been afflicted with Trump derangement syndrome, that a lot of them will say just about anything. This has been going on since President Trump was elected, but it seems to be getting worse. This week I'm looking at just the latest examples in my blog. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjxtdud-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjxtdud-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [America First?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjxtdud-kujkulhluu-n/)
There are basically two schools of thought on whether President Trump's "America First" strategy is the way to go. I'm discussing both in my blog this week and giving you my opinion on the strategy. name: The White House
subject: Success in Brussels
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=878914e216fe6a1284a1054ec3369b7ede8a5558ccdae60c1ecb782baebbb452a7d687190abf2f1cf60b39a974c705dd45489a2250c07974) The White House • July 12, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump has landed in England, where he will participate in an arrival ceremony with First Lady Melania Trump later today. |
---
|

## Success in Brussels
**As the NATO summit concluded** in Brussels today, President Trump held an extended press conference to explain what American leadership has achieved. At the President’s request, every NATO member “has agreed to substantially up their commitment. They're going to up it at levels that they never thought of before," President Trump said.
**This American success** underscores President Trump’s philosophy abroad: Actions speak louder than words. The United States values its transatlantic partners, and our leaders want to see that every member state invests in NATO’s future.
**President Trump will continue building close ties** with America’s friends as he visits the United Kingdom today. The President has worked extensively with British Prime Minister Theresa May, pushing for fair and reciprocal trade deals and joining forces with Britain and France to hold Syrian leader Bashar al-Assad accountable for chemical weapons attacks.
[Watch President Trump’s press conference this morning from Brussels.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=878914e216fe6a12749bc7b8efdd5f5706d16ecbfc7d6404ac8bd79fc8022773e2af20dc50643034567a8f60a4ed46395e14b2ea55dd8eda)
**The big picture** : [How President Trump restored U.S. leadership on the world stage ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=878914e216fe6a125f4a308a36cf9b8e5913fe0bce755b6740d06e3283aa2926222e1c96e2de934b747d45c521f33f6965eb9c7f7e78915d)

---
|

## The ‘conservative nature’ of paid family leave
**“In September 2016** , when then-Republican presidential primary candidate Donald J. Trump called for a national paid family leave plan, pundits called it ‘a striking departure from GOP orthodoxy.’ Indeed it was,” First Daughter and Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes. “[Now] there is burgeoning agreement on the intrinsically conservative nature of a national paid family leave plan.”
**Thanks largely to Ivanka Trump’s efforts** , a key Senate panel came together yesterday to examine a range of paid family leave ideas for America. Their effort gives “this critical issue real bipartisan momentum for the first time,” Ms. Trump says.
**Social and fiscal conservatives** alike are recognizing the importance of paid family leave. “Social conservatives underscore paid leave as a way to forge more tightly bonded families . . . Fiscal hawks recognize the efficiency of increasing workforce attachment and minimizing government dependence. And everyone shares the concern for our country’s plummeting fertility rates, now the lowest in history,” Ms. Trump writes.
[Ivanka Trump’s op-ed: Paid family leave is an investment in America’s families ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=878914e216fe6a12a1841416a9227343454e98fc6abcb22132acc6b7f7a5b08f203e6fcd73c0d6d1a11c83a775382fdea2de802a39338446)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**Members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization watch entertainers prior to a working dinner** | July 11, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=878914e216fe6a1297990d7ffc2a69d670ccfe69ab115122833e1f2f1e80f5219018c1a98670363c2e3fb714e157cd1181198a3994dc6de3) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=878914e216fe6a12004fbe46b67152c91b5e52151dbc1280cea865371ab3ce149add6e45602fa67206398db85afc630755f8f469579aae04) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d46c280c8574e80ed554b8c75a2ee0385c29bc327fbc367608085542e631734658b06922293225356d8a6df718a86d163a2024464d37a2ca8a)

name: Romteen Farasat
subject: Meet our regional coordinators -- working across nine counties to flip TX-10
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS [https://www
body:
http://www.siegelfortexas.org [http://www.siegelfortexas.org]
Peter,
I'm Romteen Farasat, Field Director for Mike's campaign. Since January, we've reached tens of thousands of voters at the door and on the phone. That's how we finished first in a primary field of seven candidates, and that's how we won the runoff with 70% of the vote. Now, we are building an operation that will propel us to victory in November.
The key to our effort is organizing power . With that in mind, we've hired three experienced community organizers who are building our campaign across the nine counties of TX-10. They are organizing block-walks and phone banks and postcarding parties -- any way we can meet voters, they are doing it. Meet them today, and let them know if you can help!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/63907/images/Team%20collage%20pic.png]
Our organizers, clockwise from top left: Romteen, Briana, Andrew and Jacob.
1. Jacob Aronowitz, Eastern Regional Coordinator . Jacob is a Harris County native and experienced field strategist; he is responsible for organizing our campaign in Harris and Waller counties. Jacob has worked on a wide array of campaigns for progressive candidates and nonprofits. His focus will be direct contact with constituent communities and strong cooperation with grassroots movements and groups. Email him to get involved: jacob@siegelfortexas.org, and join our next block-walk in Cypress on Saturday [https://www.facebook.com/events/240062503441559/] !
2. Andrew Dysert, Central Regional Coordinator. Andrew was drawn to political organizing by rising inequality and government ineffectiveness. He has organized and raised funds for numerous campaigns and nonprofits; advocated for local housing, environmental, and criminal justice issues; and co-founded a labor union for political canvassers. Andrew is our coordinator for Austin , Colorado , Fayette , and Washington counties. Email him at andrew@siegelfortexas.org, and meet him at the Sealybration on Saturday [https://www.facebook.com/events/288733691688182/] !
3. Briana Burns, Western Regional Coordinator. Briana is a longtime advocate for migrant justice at St. James Episcopal Church, and has worked on campaigns and organizing projects across Travis County. A school teacher and mother of two, Briana was called to this work by a need to fight back against rising inequality and intolerance. She is now organizing the campaign in Travis , Bastrop , and Lee counties. Contact Briana at briana@siegelfortexas.org, and join her in knocking on doors in Austin on Saturday [https://www.facebook.com/events/1337295686404357/] !
We are doing everything we can to reach out to every voter in this District. Please contact our organizers, sign up to volunteer [https://www.siegelfortexas.org/get-involved/] , and donate to support [https://www.siegelfortexas.org/donate/index.php?am=20] our growing efforts. With your help, this is a race we can win!
>From the trenches,
Romteen

Andrew is our coordinator for Austin , Colorado , Fayette , and Washington counties. Email him at andrew@siegelfortexas.org, and meet him at the Sealybration on Saturday [] ! 3. Briana Burns, Western Regional Coordinator. Briana is a longtime advocate for migrant justice at St. James Episcopal Church, and has worked on campaigns and organizing projects across Travis County. A school teacher and mother of two, Briana was called to this work by a need to fight back against rising inequality and intolerance. She is now organizing the campaign in Travis , Bastrop , and Lee counties. Contact Briana at briana@siegelfortexas.org, and join her in knocking on doors in Austin on Saturday [] ! We are doing everything we can to reach out to every voter in this District. Please contact our organizers, sign up to volunteer [] , and donate to support [] our growing efforts. With your help, this is a race we can win! From the trenches, Romteen Facebook [] Twitter [] Campaign website [] ActBlue [] Donate Now [] PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS [] PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701 Remove your name from our list []

body:

Friend,

Thanks so much for joining us -- I'm glad to meet you!

I've called Nevada home for over 40 years. I raised my daughters here, built my business here, and I've been lucky enough to give back through public service on the Nevada Board of Regents and the Clark County Commission.

We have worked hard to make our community a better place, but there is still so much to do. Our kids still aren't achieving their full potential in Nevada schools. Our economy is growing, but not fast enough. And our state is under assault from Washington Republicans who want to take away our access to healthcare.

That's why I'm running for governor.

It's time to refocus our priorities and make sure all Nevadans have the opportunity to send their kids to good schools, get good jobs, and have access to quality, affordable healthcare. And I won't stop until they do.

Stay up to date with my campaign by connecting with us on social media.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: response needed | re: Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/axuh8QpVhsDxM_wI731-XigoTiJVVjwcRCLWhJGnPwg=/DN7piSs_iKrtusxItgfLMJ2jVQOIw0sTO62XsNF7OJA=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_RSNO_180712_1_1&amount=20&recurring=true)

Peter, last week's news of Kennedy retiring shocked us all. Now with Kennedy gone, Trump has the power to appoint a justice -- giving us the first conservative-leaning Court in decades.

This means that the issues that matter to us -- like the decision of _Roe v. Wade_ , campaign finance reform, and even gay marriage -- are under a conservative threat.

Just two years ago, Mitch McConnell said the American people should have a voice when it came to appointing Merrick Garland. McConnell believed then that justices should wait to be appointed until after the elections. So, shouldn't we follow that same philosophy now?

| **Peter, we want to hear from you. Do you believe we should wait until after the midterm elections for President Trump to appoint a judge?** | [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/axuh8QpVhsDxM_wI731-XigoTiJVVjwcRCLWhJGnPwg=/DN7piSs_iKrtusxItgfLMJ2jVQOIw0sTO62XsNF7OJA=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_RSNO_180712_1_1_YES&amount=20&recurring=true) | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/axuh8QpVhsDxM_wI731-XigoTiJVVjwcRCLWhJGnPwg=/DN7piSs_iKrtusxItgfLMJ2jVQOIw0sTO62XsNF7OJA=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_RSNO_180712_1_1_NO&amount=20&recurring=true)

body:
We can't take back the Senate in November without Nevada. Make a contribution to my campaign and Democrats nationwide today.
---
Derek --

I'm running for Senate in Nevada in one of the most competitive races in the country, and winning here will be critical if Democrats are going to regain a Senate majority in November.

Electing more Democrats to the Senate is the only way to prevent Trump from appointing more far-right conservatives to the Supreme Court and stop him from undoing decades of progress. So I am asking you today:

**Will you contribute $10 to my campaign and Democrats nationwide right now to show you're ready to win a Democratic majority in the Senate?**

**[ DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052109f/4067b0a/671f3e8f1/7fb3ae1f/3260855658/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-jacky-rosen-july?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180712_jr_nd&source=em_20180712_jr_nd&refcode=em_20180712_jr_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052109f/4067b0a/671f3e8f1/7fb3ae1c/3260855658/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-jacky-rosen-july?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180712_jr_nd&source=em_20180712_jr_nd&refcode=em_20180712_jr_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052109f/4067b0a/671f3e8f1/7fb3ae1d/3260855658/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-jacky-rosen-july?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180712_jr_nd&source=em_20180712_jr_nd&refcode=em_20180712_jr_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052109f/4067b0a/671f3e8f1/7fb3ae1a/3260855658/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-jacky-rosen-july?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180712_jr_nd&source=em_20180712_jr_nd&refcode=em_20180712_jr_nd")
[DONATE: $200](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052109f/4067b0a/671f3e8f1/7fb3ae1b/3260855658/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-jacky-rosen-july?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20180712_jr_nd&source=em_20180712_jr_nd&refcode=em_20180712_jr_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052109f/4067b0a/671f3e8f1/7fb3ae18/3260855658/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/elect-jacky-rosen-july?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180712_jr_nd&source=em_20180712_jr_nd&refcode=em_20180712_jr_nd")
** Here's my promise to you, Derek: I will never shy away from taking on this administration in the Senate, and I will never stop short of defending our values, which are under attack by the GOP.

The Senate needs more leaders who believe that health care is a right, families belong together, and women's reproductive rights are not up for debate.

My opponent, Dean Heller, has repeatedly put the Trump administration's agenda over the well-being of the American people. Heller has voted to take away health care, defund Planned Parenthood, and give enormous tax breaks to corporations. You can also bet he'd approve any Supreme Court nominee that Trump puts before the Senate -- including Brett Kavanaugh.

We can defeat Heller and take back the Senate this fall -- but only if we do it together.

**[Contribute $10 to my campaign and Democrats nationwide today.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052109f/4067b0a/671f3e8f1/7fb3ae19/3260855658/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/elect-jacky-rosen-july?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Contribute++if+consinConsGroup28497++set&utm_campaign=em_20180712_jr_nd&source=em_20180712_jr_nd&refcode=em_20180712_jr_nd")**

Thank you for your support,

Jacky Rosen
U.S. Senate candidate, Nevada

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Why I’m asking for your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team --
Unlike a lot of campaigns this year, my team and I are always going to be upfront with you when we’re asking for your support, so I wanted to give you a heads up -- [**because of an important fundraising deadline on Sunday, you’ll be getting a few emails from my team asking you to pitch in donations of $10 or whatever amount you think is best.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1627742/8696675/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE0NWRkNi1mOTg1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29ER1vDyjKvtv_MtH1MTwf42XuPrqKrrjs23JrUEswM=&refcode=em180712-mm1-miss&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1627743/8696676/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmE0NWRkNi1mOTg1LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=29ER1vDyjKvtv_MtH1MTwf42XuPrqKrrjs23JrUEswM=&refcode=em180712-mm1-miss&recurring=true)**
It might seem like these come up quite a bit -- that’s why I wanted to take a moment to explain why deadlines like this one matter so much to our campaign to bring common sense back to Washington. **This will only take a moment.**
Right now, we are at a crossroads in our country. Washington is broken, and too many politicians out there are playing partisan games. Meanwhile, hard-working families in Tennessee are facing real problems.
People are working longer hours, but their paycheck doesn’t stretch as far as it used to. Too many families can’t afford health insurance, and the opioid crisis is killing more people annually in Tennessee than car accidents. Congress is paralyzed by hyper-partisanship, but keeps racking up debt for our kids and grandkids with no end in sight.
**Things may look bleak — but I know that by coming together to get things done, we can actually make things better.**
As governor, I did just that, working with Republicans and Democrats to create jobs and make critical investments in health care and our schools. Every step of the way, Tennesseans were ready to work together to get it done.

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: You.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
There is no way I could do any of this alone.
#

Peter -
There's one big factor that will determine what we accomplish for today's fundraising deadline, in this campaign and when I am Attorney General: You and what you're willing to do.
**I want to be clear: There is no way I could do any of this alone.**
YOU will be the reason we beat the financial and political establishment that's against us.
YOU will prove that candidates don't need to rely on corporations and billionaires -- and in fact they shouldn't.
YOU will make it possible for us to root out the corruption poisoning our politics and defend our democracy from the Constitutional crises created by Donald Trump.
Everything that we achieve will be the result of what we are collectively willing to do. If we are in this together, we will do **_so much more_** than anyone thinks is possible.
**But that starts with what you 're willing to do today:**
**[Peter, can you make a $3 donation to our campaign before our midnight deadline? The only path forward is all of us. Together.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ea3/6e822e2f/1bba8cd8/417272aa/2438487111/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTItMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180712-1-full")**
There is so much at stake in this election. Having a fearless and independent New York Attorney General has never been more important. Our next Attorney General will be responsible for leading the fight against corruption, Wall Street and Donald Trump's lawlessness. Her powers and responsibilities are so much greater than one person or even New York. It's about the future of our country.
But first, we have to beat the powerful people and wealthy interests who are trying to stop us. That's why your contribution is so important.
Thank you for helping to make all of this possible.
All my best,
Zephyr Teachout

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Stop the gun violence (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Team, It wasn't long ago that I sent you a message with one fact at its core: Students shouldn't have to live in fear of gunshots ringing down the halls of their schools. Today, I write to you with a similar message: **Neither r****eporters, nor any other hardworking American, should have to live in fear of gunshots ringing through their office or workplace.** After Parkland, I thought perhaps we could get enough Republicans to abandon their NRA funders and join with Democrats to pass some common-sense gun safety legislation. I thought the same after the Fort Lauderdale Airport tragedy, Pulse Nightclub, San Bernardino, and Newtown. **How many of these tragedies have to occur before Republicans act on gun safety?** We need changes and we need them now. [**Demand that Republicans in Congress get serious about gun safety legislation. Add your name to the petition.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f00/622b7b5b/1babc411/307b9e44/1555047673/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180709c") Don't let anyone convince you there's nothing we can do about gun violence. There is plenty we can do. We can strengthen background checks and close loopholes. We can ban assault weapons that belong in war zones, not on our streets. We can limit magazine capacity. We can allow our more scientific federal agencies to study gun violence for what it is -- an epidemic in need of a cure. **I'm willing to consider any or all of these actions and whatever others my colleagues bring to the table.** It's far past time we do something. [**If you agree, demand action now.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f00/622b7b5b/1babc411/307b9e44/1555047673/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180709c") Maybe we can't prevent every tragedy. But if we save even one life, save even one student from having to live through a horror like Parkland, it's well worth it. Thank you for joining me today. Debbie Wasserman Schultz
---

|

name: Tim Ryan
subject: VIDEO: These cities are having a comeback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Earlier this year I led a delegation of venture capitalists on a tour through the Midwest to explore new ways we can drive investment into our communities. | |
---
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9231/5486deaa/29fd8cc9/dcc5b49/1940379565/VEsH/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities") Folks, **Five cities. Four days. One bus. This is the Comeback Cities Tour, and the story I want to tell you over the next few weeks.** The challenges the United States faces in the twenty-first century are great, but too often our political dialogue doesn't even scratch the surface. Though it may not always feel like it, I believe we have the perfect opportunity right now to help rebuild and rejuvenate communities that have been struggling with the loss of manufacturing and an evolving economy by connecting them with resources traditionally concentrated on the coasts. **That is why earlier this year I led a delegation of venture capitalists on a tour through the Midwest to explore new ways we can drive investment into our communities.** [Watch and share part one of the incredible Comeback Cities Tour now >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9231/5486deaa/29fd8cc9/dcc5b49/1940379565/VEsE/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9231/5486deaa/29fd8cc9/dcc5b49/1940379565/VEsF/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities") Places like Youngstown, Akron, Detroit, Flint, and South Bend all have individual strengths and resources that can benefit greatly if meaningful connections can be established with places like Silicon Valley, New York City, and Boston. We kicked off the tour in Youngstown, Ohio and made stops in Akron, OH; Detroit, MI; Flint, MI; and South Bend, IN. Along the way our group met with local businesses, elected officials, and incubators with the goal of having the venture capitalists learn about the startup activity and investment opportunities right in our backyard. These videos helped document our journey, and the relationships that were cultivated and are paying dividends today. [Part one encompasses our stops in Youngstown and Akron -- two cities I'm proud to represent in Congress. Enjoy! ](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9231/5486deaa/29fd8cc9/dcc5b49/1940379565/VEsC/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities") \-- Tim [DONATE ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9231/5486deaa/29fd8cc9/dcc5b48/1940379565/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_july18?refcode=em20180712_comebackday1_30main")

Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: Resist.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
If you're not resisting, you're supporting.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a699/7ab0e2c4/7fe2ad24/349b9105/3094965393/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-mdmn?refcode=OHQ07128A") Friend -- Larry Hogan said something pretty revealing last week. "The one thing Ben and I have in common is that neither one of us endorsed, supported, or voted for Donald Trump." That might be true, but the thing is that right now, unless you're resisting, you're supporting. And Larry Hogan is _not resisting_. While other governors are speaking up against Trump's anti-American policies, or enacting state policies and laws, he is doing nothing. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends, I want to make sure you saw the email below from Mel about our 2nd District survey.

As Mel crosses the district talking with voters about their concerns, it's important that he hears from you too.

**[Please take just a few minutes and share what issues matter most to you. Take the survey now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ikPQdEvpqOrydt7JiI06A7OeKRTHIbVeUJ1rCH70YpM=/kHGiFo-jImqqiYwiTQAYZZS_yx0VpG1BkIK97rCMP20=)**

Thank you,

Max Harris
Campaign Manager, Mel Hall for Congress

\------------------Original message from Mel Hall------------------

Friends, I need just three minutes of your time.

I've reached out to you recently about all the work we're doing to get the campaign ready for our push over the summer and into the fall. That work begins and ends with you. I'm spending my time right now listening to the needs of Hoosier families, and I want your input.

[**Take our 2nd District survey, and tell me how I can best serve you as your next Congressperson.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ikPQdEvpqOrydt7JiI06A7OeKRTHIbVeUJ1rCH70YpM=/kHGiFo-jImqqiYwiTQAYZZS_yx0VpG1BkIK97rCMP20=)

It's been pretty hot these past few weeks, but that hasn't stopped our volunteers and me from criss-crossing the district, speaking to voters, and talking about our plans to bring accountability and transparency to Washington.

Mel

Bob has been a strong firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump administration's agenda, and now they're coming after Bob.

**_[Bob needs to raise another $5,900 today to stay on track -- can you donate $5 to help him out?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180712_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta is one of Trump's strongest supporters and closest friends. Trump wants another "yes" vote for his agenda so he's doing everything he can to get Barletta elected. So far, Trump has recorded an expensive robocall for Barletta, appeared with him at rallies and even endorsed him on Twitter while attacking Bob's record of fighting for Pennsylvanians. The president is even sending Vice President Pence to campaign for Barletta right here in Pennsylvania later this month.

None of this is surprising: Barletta votes with the president 99% of the time, while Bob does everything he can to block the parts of the GOP's agenda that would hurt Pennsylvania. Barletta is even campaigning on how he would vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and vote for President Trump's anti-worker Supreme Court nominee.

He's not wrong -- if we lose Bob's voice in the Senate, we put affordable health care and so many other priorities on the chopping block. Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid and unions would all be at risk, and that's just the tip of the iceberg.

subject: Republicans are spending M I L L I O N S against our women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c43fa/24c69fd9/184f8dfe6/1882838c/3990174671/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES25N_digital_email_20180712_McConnellPAC_inact&source=WQEFES25N_digital_email_20180712_McConnellPAC_inact")
---

Peter,

The GOP is desperate to hold onto its majority in the Senate, and a super PAC with ties to Mitch McConnell has pledged to spend **_$24 million_** to do it.

The Senate Leadership Fund is going all-in on TV ads against Democratic Senate candidates, including our own Claire McCaskill (MO) and Jacky Rosen (NV).

We need to do everything we can to counter these Republican attacks and make sure Claire, Jacky, and our 10 other Senate women can defeat their opponents this fall.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women overcome Republican attacks and flip the Senate in November.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c43fa/24c69fd9/184f8dfe6/1882838d/3990174671/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180712_email_McConnellPAC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFES25N_digital_email_20180712_McConnellPAC_inact&source=WQEFES25N_digital_email_20180712_McConnellPAC_inact")**

The McConnell-linked PAC threw in $10.5 million against Claire and $11.2 million in support of Jacky's opponent -- and that's just the tip of the iceberg. The group is expected to spend millions more on ad buys before the election.

And there's more.

Outside groups have already spent nearly $10 million in ads to defeat Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin.

With an anti-choice Supreme Court nominee and _Roe v. Wade_ on the line, it's never been more important to take back the Senate majority, but it'll be harder to do it if we're grossly outspent by Republican super PACs.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women fight back against Republican spending and flip the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Overcome-GOP-Spending](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c43fa/24c69fd9/184f8dfe6/1882838e/3990174671/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180712_email_McConnellPAC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOvercomeGOPSpend&utm_campaign=WQEFES25N_digital_email_20180712_McConnellPAC_inact&source=WQEFES25N_digital_email_20180712_McConnellPAC_inact")**

Thanks,

name: The Sanders Institute
subject: Renewable Energy Around the World
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Our leaders like to talk about "American exceptionalism," but there is nothing exceptional about America when it comes to renewable energy. In fact, we are falling far behind.
#
Friend,
Our leaders like to talk about "American exceptionalism," but America is not so exceptional when it comes to renewable energy. In fact, we are falling far behind.
Countries all around the world are demonstrating that a transition away from fossil fuels is not only possible, but is a plausible, clean, and affordable path forward. Here's a quick look at what other countries around the developed world are achieving:
* In China, an entire province the size of Texas was powered on 100% renewable energy last year.
* New Zealand recently released a plan to transition to 100% renewable energy by 2035.
* Iceland is running on 100% renewable energy mostly through geothermal plants.
* Norway produces 98% of its power needs through renewable energy.
* Holland's entire train system now runs on wind power.

We can learn from these initiatives and join their commitment to reach 100% renewable energy.
[**In our latest video, Bill McKibben describes some of the monumental, and replicable steps that countries around the world are taking towards achieving this goal.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa7b/bed43eb/64c38e6b/75fd44c3/3389947734/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/renewable-energy-around-the-world")
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa7b/bed43eb/64c38e6b/75fd44c3/3389947734/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/renewable-energy-around-the-world")
Our leaders must have the courage to admit that if we can learn from the successful energy policies of other countries, we could become a world leader in clean, sustainable energy production.
Thanks for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: The battle for the Supreme Court is in full swing
body:
Peter,
The stakes for the Supreme Court have never been higher!
On Monday night President Trump nominated Judge Brett Kavanaugh from the D.C. Court of Appeals to replace Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy.
It’s a nomination that will be far more contested than Justice Neil Gorsuch’s appointment because Judge Kavanaugh will not just be replacing another conservative vote on the bench; he will replace Kennedy’s _swing vote_.
This is a MONUMENTAL change to the Supreme Court. If Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed (an individual who is pro-constitution, pro-religious liberty, and pro-life) the Supreme Court will be changed for generations.
Liberals know this and they were enraged, and pledged to oppose the nomination even before the official nominee was announced.
Fifty-one votes are needed in the Senate to confirm Judge Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. This is going to be an extremely close vote.
The left has two key strategies at play to do everything they can to fight back.
First, they are already purchasing ads in the states where key Senators are undecided in their support for Trump’s nominee. The liberal ACLU has purchased ads targeting left-leaning Republican Senators Susan Collins of Maine and Lisa Murkowski of Alaska. Another liberal organization, Demand Justice, has announced it will spend $5 million in ads alone to fight Kavanaugh’s confirmation.
Second, the left will leverage this nomination to mobilize their base to go to the polls and win the House and the Senate in November. You’ve no doubt already heard their cries for women’s rights rooted in their deep fear that abortion rights, as they experience today, could come to an end.
The left will activate a base of voters who blindly support abortion and aggressively advance LGBTQ rights over religious liberty. The thought of this happening is frightening.
Midterm elections historically bring low turnout, but the Supreme Court nomination is giving the left a wave of enthusiasm that could lead to a devastating change in the House and Senate this November.
**If we don’t stand united NOW before November, we will find ourselves shocked by the results of the November elections.**
The key to success this election cycle is very simple, and it will guarantee Constitutional and Biblical principles prevail in the House and the Senate. **The secret weapon** –**Christians must go to the polls and vote in November.**
**Some estimate that 51 million Christians don’t plan on voting this year. We cannot allow this number to become the reality!**
Just as the left is launching millions of dollars of ads targeting the critical states where Senate seats can be changed, we have a plan to do the same.
**Your donation today will help us launch a national advertising campaign to reach 150 million households in America with compelling radio and television ads to inspire believers to vote.**
And just as the left is using social media to advance their agenda, **your donation will make it possible for us to intensify our social media campaign to activate like-minded voters across the country!**
Next, we will mobilize people of faith, as we did in 2016, to stand united for Biblical values at the polls using our **incredible voting tools and technology.** But it will require financial support from people like you to reach people of faith with these resources before November.
If you and I work together, I know we can build a powerful voting force of 90-million Christians in America!
**[But I can’t do it without you. I’m asking you to give your best donation of any amount today.](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180712apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180712apl01nd&n=1)**
If we fail to counter the liberal left, I can promise you they will out-mobilize us with a voting force to bring anti-biblical agendas to the House and Senate.
The left’s opposition to this Supreme Court nominee is so strong, so unhinged, and so well-funded that we cannot afford to wait another day. We must get to work NOW.
**[Please, make your best gift to see millions stand united at the polls for Biblical values.](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180712apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180712apl01nd&n=2)**
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180712apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180712apl01nd&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180712apl01nd&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180712apl01nd&n=5).

subject: Take ownership of this race

body:
#
Peter --
It’s no secret that our campaign is facing big challenges. While we’re focused on bringing people together, the partisans and special interests who’ve broken Congress are trying to bring their Washington politics here to Tennessee.
[**Thanks to your donations of $10 or more ahead of fundraising deadlines like this Sunday’s**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1630991/8711712/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjMxMTc4Ni0yMTg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=urmIoUqZFivTyfDZFcYvAwmoiaXAbP8DyiIE_hMVswU=&refcode=em180712-mm2-miss&recurring=true), we’ve so far been able to tune out the partisan noise and stay focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans.
But here’s the hard truth -- the Washington establishment is going to do everything it can in these final months to tear us down and bring their toxic politics to our state.
They’re already starting to flood our airwaves, mailboxes, and news feeds with the same partisan rancor that’s created the chaos and gridlock that has paralyzed Washington.
**We can’t let them decide what this campaign is about — we need to take ownership of this race.**
With your support, we’ll be able to keep rolling up our sleeves and doing the important work of getting our message in front of voters. You’re helping us run this campaign the right way — opening field offices, knocking on doors, making calls, and talking to Tennesseans about what’s important to them. **So I’m asking:**
[**Can you make a contribution of $10 to our campaign? Grassroots supporters like you are our only hope to keep this race focused on Tennessee.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1630992/8711713/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjMxMTc4Ni0yMTg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=urmIoUqZFivTyfDZFcYvAwmoiaXAbP8DyiIE_hMVswU=&refcode=em180712-mm2-miss&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1630993/8711714/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjMxMTc4Ni0yMTg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=urmIoUqZFivTyfDZFcYvAwmoiaXAbP8DyiIE_hMVswU=&refcode=em180712-mm2-miss&recurring=true)**
With your support, we’ll have the resources we need to show that when people come together in Tennessee, we can fix the mess in Washington.
Thanks for all you do,
Laura Zapata
Communications Director
Bredesen for Senate

subject: Friend, you need to watch this video about Bob Hugin:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

With Donald Trump in the White House doing everything he can to undermine the Affordable Care Act and reward his friends in the pharmaceutical and insurance industries, we both know it's never mattered more for New Jersey to have Bob Menendez fighting for us.

But what about your friends and neighbors?

Do they know Republican Senate candidate Bob Hugin is Donald Trump's personal friend, a former Trump campaign finance chair in New Jersey, and a money man who donated more than $100,000 to help get Trump elected?

And do they know how Hugin made millions jacking up the price of cancer drugs?

If your friends watch television, they most certainly won't get answers to those questions from the $20 million Hugin has committed to spend trying to buy this election. That's why we're launching a new website today as well as the first in a series of videos exposing how Hugin gouged cancer patients and enabled Trump.

[**Watch the first video on Facebook, share it, and tell your friends to check out HealthNewsNJ.com for more information:**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c90/3af3c5d/3b750f72/4ec381d3/2956458132/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/HealthNewsNJ/videos/241688356433096/") [](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c90/3af3c5d/3b750f72/4ec381d3/2956458132/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/HealthNewsNJ/videos/241688356433096/")
| [Share on Facebook](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c90/3af3c5d/3b750f72/4ec381d2/2956458132/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.facebook.com/HealthNewsNJ/videos/241688356433096/")

We can't let Hugin buy a Senate seat to help Trump dismantle the Affordable Care Act and enrich himself at the expense of working New Jerseyans.

It's never mattered more for strong Democrats like you to help Bob Menendez win re-election. Working together to make sure voters know Hugin will do whatever Trump or the drug company lobbyists want is one of the ways we'll combat the millions Hugin is spending in this election.

[**Watch the video on Facebook and share it with your friends right now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c90/3af3c5d/3b750f72/4ec381d3/2956458132/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/HealthNewsNJ/videos/241688356433096/")

Thank you,

Frank

Frank Schultz
Campaign Manager
Menendez for Senate

As I'm sure you know, we're facing a divisive and extreme opponent this fall.

We want to make sure we stay focused on the issues that matter most to people, while continuing to advocate for a Virginia that works for all - _NOT a rhetoric of discord and hate._

**Tim knows that our most valuable resource as a campaign is our supporters - all of you, Derek. So we 're coming to you directly to help craft our strategy and our message:**

[Your responses matter! Take just a minute to give us your feedback so that your ideas can factor into our 2018 General Election strategy.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f126e/3e0906/69838829/3e359515/3146362850/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/general-election-survey?source=20180712_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Your+responses+matter+Take+just+a+minute&utm_campaign=20180712_1_SURV_TEAM_Campaign-Surv-RS")

_Tim Kaine for Virginia 2018_

[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4899/d0ce7de/513c3ace/9cd3985/649323015/VEsE/ "http://www.mollykelly.com")
Dear friends,

Over the past several weeks, the Trump administration has been despicably violating human rights and common sense by ripping children from their parents' arms at the southern border. This has rightfully sparked outrage among Granite Staters and many Americans across the country.

But two private prison companies are getting rich off of the detention of families. These companies - Florida-based Geo Group and Tennessee-based CoreCivic, Inc. - are bringing in billions of dollars in revenue.

They're also funding Chris Sununu's reelection campaign. Sununu has taken $23,000 in campaign contributions from these two large private prison companies that are now profiting off of family separation and detention at the southern border. **[Since I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you, can you help our campaign by making a $5 contribution?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4899/d0ce7de/513c3ace/9cd3984/649323015/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNzktZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk79-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

I've asked Sununu to donate the private prison funds to a nonprofit organization that is working to reunite children with their parents. Nothing is more urgent than getting these children back with their parents as soon as possible. **Sununu is refusing.**

From the start of my campaign, I've not taken a penny in contributions from corporations because the people of New Hampshire deserve to know that I will put their interests first. Instead, I'm running a grassroots campaign, powered by you. **[Can you donate $5 or more today?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4899/d0ce7de/513c3ace/9cd3984/649323015/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNzktZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk79-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Thank you,

Molly
